---
title: 'Daddy... How do you see me?'
date: '2019-05-26T00:53:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8889430253958015279'
blogger_filename: '/2019/05/daddy-how-do-you-see-me.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<br />
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
Daddy... How do you
see me?</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
I see a young man
who is scared... Scared of the pressure to become something he doesn't know he
can be... Scared of the passions and desires inside that do not line up with
what he feels is right.</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
It's NOT your job to
become... It's your job to pursue my presence. That is literally your only job.
Strive to enter my rest. </div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
As you enter my
presence, LIFE pours into you, and LIFE changes you from the inside out,
without any effort on your part.</div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;">
You cannot change...
You can only pursue my presence and let me do the changing.</div>
<br />
